_comment: Single source of truth for tier→model mapping (AI_OPERATIONS_PLAN §2.2). Only /research may change a mapping, after verifying the official model catalog. The hygiene routine syncs agent frontmatter from this file. No other file may hardcode a model name.

reasoning.notes: Orchestrator, planner, evaluator, security-reviewer, db-engineer. Fable 5 (claude-fable-5) is a valid upgrade for the hardest planning/evaluation passes; usage-credit pricing applies after 2026-06-22.

builder.notes: Routine implementation of one well-briefed feature. Sonnet 4.6 at ~60% of Opus per-token price.

fast.notes: Explorer/search/triage fan-out. Returns conclusions, never file dumps.
